name: Zen Homepage
description: Minimal new tab with liquid glass clock and custom wallpaper. Supports PNG, JPG, GIF, AVIF, WEBP.
author: taroimo
content_security_policy: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:;
